---
title: "Boost Like a (Var)Pro on arXiv"
date: 2026-03-25
description: "Our preprint [Boost Like a (Var)Pro: Trust-Region Gradient Boosting via Variable Projection](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.23658) is on arXiv."
---

Our preprint [Boost Like a (Var)Pro: Trust-Region Gradient Boosting via Variable Projection](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.23658) is on arXiv.
